token.title: OAuth Access Token (optional)
token.description: Google OAuth access token to use as a Bearer token (typically short-lived).

serviceAccountJson.title: Service Account JSON (recommended)
serviceAccountJson.description: Full service account key JSON (contents of the downloaded JSON file).

subject.title: Subject / impersonated user (optional)
subject.description: Optional user email to impersonate when using Google Workspace domain-wide delegation.
